texto: We are the pigeons of peace.We are the peacocks of justice.We are the symbols of kindness.We fill the heart with happiness.We love with joy to each other.We will not forget it forever.We are the future
autor: we are the children.We will make this world a peaceful garden.
explicacao: Citação de we are the children.We will make this world a peaceful garden. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “We are the pigeons of peace.We are the peacocks of justice.We are the symbols of kindness.We fill…” articula amor, debasish-mridha, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
